notes: HAR-299 runtime-backed coverage for productOptionsReorder. The referenced product option capture supplies Shopify option/value payload shape and downstream variant graph evidence; the runtime test executes productOptionsReorder directly, verifies option and option-value order, validates missing product/options branches, and checks derived variant selectedOptions/title/order read-after-write effects. The generic parity runner does not replay this reorder root as a single captured proxy request.
